title: festuca cinerea subsp. arenicola
intro: Festuca cinerea subsp. arenicola, also known as the sand fescue, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities. It is believed to have various health benefits, including soothing sore throats and reducing fever, due to its high content of essential oils and flavonoids. Festuca cinerea subsp. arenicola can be prepared into teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies.
